mechanism: Non-GAAP earnings overstate true profitability by 20-35% for tech mega-caps due to SBC exclusion. If valuations are based on overstated earnings, the 'robust consumption' priced by equities requires even stronger labor markets than headline multiples suggest
regime_dependence: Strongest for tech-heavy indices (S&P, Nasdaq) where SBC is 8-15% of revenue. Less relevant for non-tech sectors.
